name: The Albatross Den
about: The Albatross Den is an exclusive, members-only indoor golf venue located in Tequesta, Florida. The facility offers a luxurious, private setting for golf enthusiasts to enjoy championship-level simulators year-round, free from weather delays or course crowding. Designed with a refined country club ambiance, the space provides privacy, exclusivity, and a community of serious golfers with access to tour-grade technology and elegant amenities.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level simulators with uncompromising precision for every shot
Private, members-only access with an exclusive community atmosphere
Luxurious amenities including plush lounges, private lockers, and flat-screen TVs
Year-round golf without weather delays or course restrictions
PGA instruction available from Chase Minnick with elite-level coaching experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not indicated

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified, but members typically use their own clubs for private practice and rounds.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so guests should confirm whether outside food and beverages are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time not specified, but simulator play generally takes 2-3 hours depending on pace and group size.

faq.question: Is The Albatross Den kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is described as a private, members-only space for serious golfers and adults.
